sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الْأَخْطَاءُ جُزْءٌ طَبِيعِيٌّ مِنَ التَّعَلُّمِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, greške su prirodni dio učenja.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, mistakes are a natural part of learning.

sentences.arabic: لَا يُوجَدُ شَخْصٌ نَجَحَ بِدُونِ أَنْ يُخْطِئَ.
sentences.translation: Ne postoji osoba koja je uspjela a da nije griješila.
sentences.translationEn: There is no person who succeeded without making mistakes.

sentences.arabic: الْخَطَأُ يُعَلِّمُنَا مَا لَا تُعَلِّمُنَا الْكُتُبُ.
sentences.translation: Greška nas uči ono što nam knjige ne mogu naučiti.
sentences.translationEn: A mistake teaches us what books cannot teach us.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَخَفْ مِنَ الْخَطَأِ بَلْ تَعَلَّمْ مِنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Ne boj se greške, nego uči iz nje.
sentences.translationEn: Do not be afraid of the mistake but learn from it.
